instructions.siteEligible: true if the study should appear anywhere on the website for LM patients; false otherwise
instructions.rationale: Short evidence-based note from the ClinicalTrials.gov record

reviews.briefTitle: Efficacy and Resistance Mechanisms of IP in NSCLC With Leptomeningeal Metastases
reviews.rationale: ClinicalTrials.gov conditions and eligibility specify metastatic NSCLC with leptomeningeal metastases after TKI resistance.

reviews.briefTitle: Double Dose of Third-generation EGFR-TKI Plus Intrathecal Pemetrexed Versus Double Dose of Third-generation EGFR-TKI in Patients With LM Progression Following the Treatment of Routine Dose of Third-generation EGFR-TKI
reviews.rationale: Protocol is for patients with LM progression after third-generation EGFR-TKI in advanced NSCLC.

reviews.briefTitle: Sacituzumab Govitecan and Intrathecal Chemotherapy for Treating Leptomeningeal Metastases From Her2-negative Breast Cancer
reviews.rationale: Record is explicitly for leptomeningeal metastases from HER2-negative breast cancer.

reviews.briefTitle: Immune Checkpoint Inhibitor Combined With Pemetrexed Intrathecal Injection for Leptomeningeal Metastasis From Solid Tumors
reviews.rationale: Study treats leptomeningeal metastasis from solid tumors, so it is LM-relevant and not tumor-specific.

reviews.briefTitle: Intrathecal Pemetrexed for SCLC Patients With Refractory Brain Metastases or Leptomeninges Metastatic
reviews.rationale: Eligibility is for SCLC patients with refractory brain metastases or leptomeningeal metastasis.

reviews.briefTitle: Testing Proton Craniospinal Radiation Therapy Versus the Usual Radiation Therapy for Leptomeningeal Metastasis, RADIATE-LM Trial
reviews.rationale: Conditions include metastatic breast carcinoma and metastatic lung NSCLC with leptomeningeal metastasis.

reviews.briefTitle: Hippocampal Avoidance in Craniospinal Irradiation for the Treatment of Leptomeningeal Metastases From Breast Cancer or Non-small Cell Lung Cancer
reviews.rationale: Protocol covers leptomeningeal metastases from breast cancer or NSCLC.

reviews.briefTitle: Intrathecal Pemetrexed Combined With High-dose Furmonertinib and Beva for EGFR-m NSCLC With Leptomeningeal Metastases
reviews.rationale: Trial is for EGFR-mutant NSCLC with leptomeningeal metastases.

reviews.briefTitle: Efficacy and Safety of Intrathecal Administration of Thiotepa in Combination With Methotrexate in Breast Cancer With Leptomeningeal Metastasis
reviews.rationale: Eligibility and title specify breast cancer with leptomeningeal metastasis.

reviews.briefTitle: Clinical Study of QH104 Cell Injection for the Treatment of Meningeal Metastases of B7H3+ Solid Tumors
reviews.rationale: Study enrolls B7H3+ solid tumors with meningeal metastases, so it is LM-relevant across solid tumors.

reviews.briefTitle: Study in Patients With Breast Cancer Leptomeningeal Metastasis
reviews.rationale: Observational study is specifically in patients with breast-cancer leptomeningeal metastasis.

reviews.briefTitle: Evaluating High-dose Furmonertinib with Bevacizumab and Pemetrexed for EGFRm NSCLC with Leptomeningeal Metastasis
reviews.rationale: Record is for EGFR-mutant NSCLC with leptomeningeal metastasis.

reviews.briefTitle: Intrathecal Injection Pemetrexed And Bevacizumab in Patients With Leptomeningeal Metastases in NSCLC
reviews.rationale: Protocol treats leptomeningeal metastases in NSCLC.

reviews.briefTitle: A Real-world Study on the Treatment of Non-small Cell Lung Cancer With Leptomeningeal Metastasis in China
reviews.rationale: Real-world study is limited to non-small cell lung cancer with leptomeningeal metastasis.

reviews.briefTitle: Concurrent Azeliragon With Craniospinal Irradiation
reviews.rationale: Official title and conditions include leptomeningeal metastasis from solid tumor malignancies or high-grade gliomas, so it spans GBM-like glioma and other solid tumors.

reviews.briefTitle: Evaluation of the Efficacy and Safety of Furmonertinib Combined with Bevacizumab As First-Line Treatment for EGFR-Positive Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer with Brain Metastases: a Single-Arm, Open-Label, Prospective Phase II Clinical Study
reviews.rationale: Although framed around brain metastases, the conditions module also lists leptomeningeal metastases in EGFR-positive NSCLC.

reviews.briefTitle: Intrathecal Combination of Programmed Death-1 (PD-1)/Cytotoxic T-Lymphocyte-Associated Protein 4 (CTLA-4) Bispecific Antibody and Pemetrexed for Leptomeningeal Metastasis
reviews.rationale: Protocol is for leptomeningeal metastasis without a specific primary tumor type.

reviews.briefTitle: Ivonescimab Combined With Chemotherapy for the Treatment of Leptomeningeal Metastases Failed to EGFR-TKIs
reviews.rationale: Study treats leptomeningeal metastases in patients who failed EGFR-TKIs and the record is NSCLC-based.

reviews.briefTitle: Intrathecal PD-1/VEGF Bispecific Antibody Plus Pemetrexed for Leptomeningeal Metastasis
reviews.rationale: Intervention is for leptomeningeal metastasis and the record is not restricted to a single primary tumor type.

reviews.briefTitle: Intrathecal Dual Checkpoint Inhibitor (PD-1 and CTLA-4) in Combination With Pemetrexed for Leptomeningeal Metastasis
reviews.rationale: Conditions include leptomeningeal metastasis and solid tumors, so it belongs in the catch-all solid-tumor bucket.

reviews.briefTitle: A Phase IIa Study to Evaluate NBQ72S
reviews.rationale: The title is generic, but eligibility requires breast cancer with leptomeningeal metastasis confirmed by MRI or CSF cytology.

reviews.briefTitle: High-dose Furmonertinib Combined With Bevacizumab and Intrathecal Pemetrexed Chemotherapy in Patients With EGFR-mutated Non-small Cell Lung Cancer and Meningeal Metastasis
reviews.rationale: Trial is for EGFR-mutated non-small cell lung cancer with meningeal metastasis.

reviews.briefTitle: Cerebrospinal Fluid Cytology-guided Intrathecal Chemo-holiday Therapy for EGFR-positive NSCLC Leptomeningeal Metastases
reviews.rationale: Study is limited to EGFR-positive NSCLC leptomeningeal metastases.

reviews.briefTitle: A Study of the Safety and Efficacy of Pemetrexed Combined with Nivolumab Via Intraventricular Injection for the Treatment of Refractory Non-squamous Non-small Cell Lung Cancer with Leptomeningeal Metastases
reviews.rationale: Protocol is for refractory non-squamous NSCLC with leptomeningeal metastases.

reviews.briefTitle: Photon Craniospinal Irradiation for the Treatment of Leptomeningeal Disease Secondary to Breast Cancer or Non-small Cell Lung Cancer
reviews.rationale: Conditions explicitly include leptomeningeal disease secondary to breast cancer or NSCLC.

reviews.briefTitle: A Clinical Study of Furmonertinib in the Treatment of EGFR-Mutated NSCLC With Leptomeningeal Metastases
reviews.rationale: Record is for EGFR-mutated NSCLC with leptomeningeal metastases.

reviews.briefTitle: High-Dose Firmonertinib Combined With Bevacizumab and Intrathecal Pemetrexed in the Treatment of EGFR-Mutated Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer With Leptomeningeal Metastasis
reviews.rationale: Trial targets EGFR-mutated NSCLC with leptomeningeal metastasis.

reviews.briefTitle: Study of Craniospinal Irradiation With Linac Based Volumetric Modulated Arc Therapy (VMAT) for Patients With Leptomeningeal Metastasis
reviews.rationale: Craniospinal irradiation study enrolls patients with leptomeningeal metastasis from solid tumors.

reviews.briefTitle: AI-Based Ultrasound Prediction Model for Intracranial Pressure and Prognosis in Lung Cancer Patients With Leptomeningeal Metastasis: A Dual-Center Study
reviews.rationale: Observational study is in lung cancer patients with leptomeningeal metastasis.

reviews.briefTitle: Firmonertinib Combined With Intrathecal Injection for the Treatment of EGFR Mutant NSCLC With Leptomeningeal Metastases
reviews.rationale: Study is for EGFR-mutant NSCLC with leptomeningeal metastases.

reviews.briefTitle: Multiple Dose Intraventricular Administration of Rhenium-186 NanoLiposome for Leptomeningeal Metastases
reviews.rationale: Eligibility allows documented LM from any primary solid tumor cancer.

reviews.briefTitle: Phase I/II Study of Intrathecal/Ommaya T-DXd in HER2-Expressing Breast Cancer With Leptomeningeal/Brain Metastases
reviews.rationale: Trial is for HER2-expressing breast cancer with leptomeningeal/brain metastases.

reviews.briefTitle: Stupp Treatment With Intrathecal Injection of Thiotepa for Glioblastoma With Advanced Spread
reviews.rationale: Study is in glioblastoma with meningeal spread, which maps to the GBM category.

reviews.briefTitle: Allogeneic, Antigen-Presenting, GM-CSF-secreting, SV-BR-1-GM Whole Cell-Therapeutic Vaccine and Immunotherapy: A Phase I Pilot Safety and Feasibility Study for Solid Tumor Patients With CNS Metastases
reviews.rationale: Broad solid-tumor CNS metastasis study explicitly includes leptomeningeal metastases as an eligible CNS site.

reviews.briefTitle: Firmonertinib in the Treatment of EGFR(+) NSCLC Patients With Central Nervous System Metastasis
reviews.rationale: Observational NSCLC study includes central nervous system metastasis and lists leptomeningeal metastasis in the condition set.

reviews.briefTitle: Efficacy and Safety of Intrathecal Administration of Thiotepa in Combination With Trastuzumab in Breast Cancer With Leptomeningeal Metastasis
reviews.rationale: Trial is for breast cancer with leptomeningeal metastasis.

reviews.briefTitle: Evaluate the Safety, Tolerability, Biodistribution Characteristics and Preliminary Efficacy of BioTTT001
reviews.rationale: BioTTT001 is being tested in NSCLC patients with MRI- or CSF-confirmed leptomeningeal metastasis.

reviews.briefTitle: Furmonertinib Combined With Intrathecal Chemotherapy and Stereotactic Radiotherapy (SRT) for EGFR-Mutated NSCLC Patients With Brain Parenchymal and Leptomeningeal Metastases
reviews.rationale: Study is for EGFR-mutated NSCLC patients with brain parenchymal and leptomeningeal metastases.

reviews.briefTitle: Pulsatile High-dose Furmonertinib in EGFR-mutant NSCLC With Leptomeningeal Metastasis
reviews.rationale: Protocol is for EGFR-mutant NSCLC with leptomeningeal metastasis.

reviews.briefTitle: Zorifertinib With Osimertinib for NSCLC With Meningeal Progression
reviews.rationale: The title says meningeal progression, and eligibility explicitly requires leptomeningeal metastases in advanced NSCLC.

reviews.briefTitle: Development of a Novel Graded Prognostic Assessment (BC-LGPA) Model for Breast Cancer Leptomeningeal Metastasis
reviews.rationale: Study develops a prognostic model for breast-cancer leptomeningeal metastasis.

reviews.briefTitle: B7-H3.CD28Z.CART in CNS Neoplasms
reviews.rationale: Broad CNS-neoplasm CAR-T trial includes leptomeningeal disease, but the primary tumor types are not among the named site labels.

reviews.briefTitle: Double-Dose Third-Generation EGFR-TKI Plus Bevacizumab and Intrathecal Chemotherapy for Refractory Leptomeningeal Metastatic NSCLC: A Phase II Study
reviews.rationale: Study is for refractory leptomeningeal metastatic NSCLC.

reviews.briefTitle: Phase 1 Study Of Intrathecal Cellular Adoptive Immunotherapy Using Autologous CD8+ Antigen-Specific T Cells For Patients With Leptomeningeal Melanoma
reviews.rationale: Trial is explicitly for leptomeningeal melanoma.

reviews.briefTitle: Optimizing Contrast Dose and Scanning Parameters for Detection of Leptomeningeal Disease
reviews.rationale: Diagnostic study focuses on suspected leptomeningeal disease in patients with solid malignancy, not a single named primary tumor type.

reviews.briefTitle: CSF and Blood Plasma Liquid Biopsy in Patients With Metastatic Solid Tumours and CNS Metastases or no CNS Metastases
reviews.rationale: Feasibility study includes a cohort with leptomeningeal metastatic disease from solid tumours.
